topics.officialTitle: Location of Africa on the Map of the World
topics.appTitle: Location of Africa on the map of the world

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Location and position of Africa using major lines of latitudes and longitudes
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Subtopic 1 rewritten using NCDC Topic 1 evidence plus Britannica support for Equator, Tropics and Prime Meridian map-line facts. Longitude time calculation removed from this subtopic pending source/extension decision.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: World continents and their sizes
Water bodies that surround Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Subtopic rewritten to focus on NCDC-required oceans, seas and compass directions. Marine gateways/channels removed pending source/extension decision.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Regions that make up Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Subtopic rewritten to focus on the six NCDC-named regions and map-location practice. Broad uses/importance filler removed.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Countries in each region and their capital cities
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Learner flow now uses a shorter P7 school-first list by region. Full reference pack remains support material and still needs teacher/founder review for special capital cases.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Islands which are part of Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Learner flow now teaches common African island countries and capitals. Full reference pack remains support material and still needs teacher/founder review.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Mountains and highlands
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Subtopic rewritten from NCDC evidence. Feature-country examples included as school-first map support and still need atlas/teacher review before premium-final status.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Rivers
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Subtopic rewritten from NCDC river list and assessment requirement about oceans/seas into which major rivers flow. River-mouth details included as school-first support and need atlas/teacher review before premium-final status.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Lakes
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Subtopic rewritten from NCDC lake list. Lake-location notes included as school-first map support and need atlas/teacher review before premium-final status.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Plateau, rift valley and coastal plains
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Subtopic rewritten from NCDC evidence. Location examples kept broad and map-based; detailed locations need atlas/teacher review before premium-final status.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Formation of major physical features of Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten around folded, fault-block and volcanic mountain formation plus diagram/model practice. Needs teacher/atlas review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Application practice for physical features
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Application practice now aligns to NCDC assessment competences: naming, locating, formation, diagrams and value answers.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Climatic regions of Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten from NCDC climate region list; country examples/map areas need atlas/teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Characteristics of different climatic regions
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten around characteristics of equatorial, tropical, desert, Mediterranean, temperate and mountain climates. Country examples need atlas/teacher review.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Factors that influence climate of Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten from NCDC factor list. Examples are school-first and need atlas/teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Influence of climate on human activities
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten from NCDC activity list by climate type. Examples need atlas/teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Influence of human activities on climate
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten around harmful human activities, effects and protection actions. Needs teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Application practice for climate interpretation
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Application practice aligns to NCDC climate assessment competences: regions, characteristics, factors, activities, human influence and protection.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Location and names of vegetation types of Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten from NCDC vegetation type list. Broad location examples need atlas/teacher review before premium-final status.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Factors that influence vegetation distribution in Africa
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten from NCDC factor list: climate, soil, human activities, relief/altitude. Examples need teacher review before premium-final status.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Importance of vegetation to people and animals
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten around importance to people, animals/environment, and caring for vegetation. Needs teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Game parks and animals in vegetation zones
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten around importance of game parks, animals in zones, reasons animals live in zones and caring for animals/birds. Animal examples need teacher review.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Population distribution in relation to vegetation and effects of population on vegetation
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten around population distribution, reasons for differences, effects of big population and protection solutions. Needs teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Application practice for vegetation reasoning
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Application practice aligns to NCDC vegetation assessment competences: types, factors, importance, animals/game parks and population effects.

topics.officialTitle: The People of Africa, the Ethnic Groups and Settlement Patterns
topics.appTitle: People of Africa, ethnic groups and settlement

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Origin of different ethnic groups
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten respectfully from NCDC evidence. Sensitive older group terms handled carefully and need teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Movements of different ethnic groups into Africa
requiredKnowledgeBlocks: movement routes or direction where sourced
officialSubtopicMappings.notes: Rewritten from NCDC movement/migration guidance. Exact routes need atlas/teacher review before premium-final.

officialSubtopicMappings.officialSubtopic: Settlement patterns of different ethnic groups
Tribes belonging to different ethnic groups
Reasons for migration and settlement of ethnic groups in Africa
Problems met by ethnic groups during movement and settlement in Africa
Effects of ethnic migrations
